---
name: Feature request / RFC
about: Propose a new capability, module, or change to existing behaviour.
title: "rfc: <short description>"
labels: ["rfc"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Orbiteus is spec-first. Larger changes (new modules, new core behaviour,
API contract changes) should be discussed here before code is written.

For tiny improvements, a PR without an RFC is fine.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected? Why does it matter now? -->

## Proposal

<!-- High-level shape of the solution. No need to write code yet. -->

## Scope

- [ ] New module (`backend/modules/<name>/`)
- [ ] Change to `orbiteus_core`
- [ ] Admin UI primitive or view type
- [ ] API contract change (OpenAPI / ui-config)
- [ ] Migration / data model change
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you discard them? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- Anything explicitly NOT covered by this proposal. -->

## Questions for maintainers

1. ...
2. ...

## References

<!-- Links to `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` sections, module specs, external standards, prior art in Odoo/Supabase/etc. -->
